arts.ttl: Preview: Derby County vs. Luton Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Championship clash between Derby County and Luton Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright 'absolutely worried' as he and Gary Neville nail Derby County's £100m problem
arts.sum: Neville can see promoted teams panic about how much they can spend in case they go down and face the financial consequences – and an anomaly like Nottingham Forest, who wrote big cheques to beat the system, both still almost got relegated and were then hit by penalties for breaking Premier League profit and sustainability rules. Neville said: “There’s a football question (about why teams are going straight back down) but there is also the financial disparity between what’s happening in the Championship and Premier League and we’ve talked about this for years.”

arts.ttl: Luton Town ace piles on Derby County pressure with stark two-word verdict
arts.sum: It has left Luton with it all to do in the final four games of the season and Clark says Good Friday's trip to Derby is pivotal. Luton Town midfielder Jordan Clark says Friday's clash with Derby County is a "must-win" in the battle for Championship survival.

Centre-back Rob Atkinson dealt a sickening blow to Derby's survival hopes in gameweek 42 as his stoppage-time strike earned Portsmouth a point at Fratton Park. The Rmas have drawn back-to-back leagu...

arts.ttl: Striker handed triple money offer as boss prepares to lose star man amid Derby County transfer link
arts.sum: St Mirren boss Stephen Robinson has been resigned to losing Olusanya ever since he turned down a new deal with the club. St Mirren forward Toyosi Olusanya has decided on a move to America despite links to Derby County and other clubs in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Championship midfielder speaks out amid Derby County 'rumours'
arts.sum: Hull City midfielder Regan Slater has cooled speculation linking him with a move to Derby County and Stoke City and says his focus is keeping the Tigers in the Championship. "We've got big games to concentrate on, and I want to make sure we're not in League One next year.
